panels.description: Wide panoramic shot: The narrator trekking through a desolate, frozen wilderness. Barren trees, gray sky, distant mountains. The figure appears small and isolated against the vast, inhospitable landscape.

bubbles.text: I followed the rivers, but the dæmon avoided the populated lands. I lived on what the wild provided.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The protagonist huddled by a small, dying campfire in the snow, eyes closed, expression serene despite the harsh conditions.

bubbles.text: My waking life is hateful. Only in sleep do I taste joy... blessed, rapturous sleep.

panels.description: Dream sequence / hallucinatory panel: Ethereal, soft-focus view of Elizabeth, Clerval, and the father smiling warmly. Warm golden light contrasts with the cold blues of the previous panel.

bubbles.text: I see their faces. I cling to the memory of their voices to survive the waking agony.

panels.description: Medium shot: The protagonist staring intensely at a tree bark. A mocking message is carved into the wood: 'My reign is not yet over... Come on, my enemy.'

bubbles.text: My power is complete. I seek the everlasting ices of the north. Come on, my enemy.

panels.description: Close-up: The protagonist's face, features twisted in rage and grim determination. Snow falling heavily around them. In the far distance, a glimpse of a dark, icy ocean horizon.

bubbles.text: Scoffing devil! I vow vengeance. I will follow you to the ends of the earth until one of us perishes!
